# Engagement Supporting NBS Design

Author1, Author2, and Author3

<span style="color: red;">ALL CONTENT IN THIS REPORT IS PRELIMINARY AND DRAFT. DO NOT REFERENCE FOR ANY PURPOSE.</span>

Key topics:  

- Interdisciplinary dialog.  
- Best practices for incorporating different ways of knowing.  
- Initiating community processes: stakeholder analysis, outreach mechanisms and tools.  
- Facilitation and engagement processes: visioning, charettes, prioritization, elicitation, etc.
